title: Timing Flows (timing.co)

book.title: NVIDIA NeMo Guardrails Library Developer Guide

content: Timing Flows ( timing.co ) Flows related to timing and reacting to periods of silence. wait $time_s $timer_id="wait_timer_{uid()}" Wait the specified number of seconds before continuing Example: repeating timer $timer_id $interval_s Start a repeating timer Example: user was silent $time_s Wait for when the user was silent for $time_s seconds Example: user didnt respond $time_s Wait for when the user was silent for $time_s seconds while the bot was silent Example: bot was silent $time_s Wait for the bot to be silent (no utterance) for given time Example
summary: Flows related to timing and reacting to periods of silence.
